'''Lazerian VII''' was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]].<ref name="TSoK" /> It was located within the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" /> The planet was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with ten [[Moon/Legends|moons]], and [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] known as [[Lazerian (star)|Lazerian]]. Lazerian VII was found along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] known as the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]] and [[Kira Run]]. It was once surveyed by the [[Lazerian (people)|Lazerians]] of [[Lazerian IV]], another planet in the Lazerian system.<ref name="TSoK" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lazerian VII was created by [[John Terra]] and introduced in [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']], a [[1993]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TSoK" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Lazerian [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Lazerian VII, in grid square N-15.<ref name="TEA" />
